limitations: Pure-function discovery is intentionally conservative; functions with side effects, calls, imports, async/yield, or complex bodies are marked not applicable.

When Hypothesis or fast-check project wiring is unavailable or not yet safely generated, Pramaan emits deterministic differential evidence with the same seed/replay/corpus receipt fields and labels it non-tool-backed.
